message:
test(fuse_e2e): add fscrypt policy v2 E2E coverage (bd-s35v4)

Add FS_IOC_GET_ENCRYPTION_POLICY_EX test verifying v2 policy round-trip:
- build_fscrypt_context_v2() helper with 16-byte identifier + nonce
- build_ext4_fscrypt_policy_v2_image() with proper superblock fields
- fuse_ioctl_ext4_get_encryption_policy_ex_returns_v2_policy test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
